text:
Market today: The mood is shaky, driven by election uncertainty and specific company news. For us, the real driver is anything impacting tech and chips.

Your holdings: QQQ (-2.94%), SMH (-13.48%), SOXL (-49.47%), QQQI (-4.17%), SPAL (-48.35%), and PTNM (-15.25%) are all flagged for attention. CRWD (15.27%) and SPY (1.32%) are holding steady.

Watch: Keep an eye on Apple's momentum and Nvidia's valuation race.

Bottom line: Focus on managing your tech and chip exposure, especially the leveraged positions.
plays: Trim QQQI if it breaks below 52.
Consider trimming SMH if it breaks below 540.
No new buys today - hold and watch.
